connections.description: Healthcare has the strictest PII/PHI regulations (HIPAA, HITECH)
connections.when: healthcare informatics enhances PII privacy regulations

connections.description: Hallucinated medical information can cause patient harm
connections.when: healthcare informatics depends on anti hallucination
connections.yields: anti hallucination required patterns and guidance

connections.description: Clinical evidence requires proper citation of guidelines and studies
connections.when: healthcare informatics connects to citation management

connections.description: Clinical research methodology aligns with research-first principles
connections.when: healthcare informatics connects to research first development
connections.yields: research first development patterns and guidance

connections.description: Healthcare AI requires the highest standard of responsible AI practices
connections.when: healthcare informatics enhances privacy responsible AI

notes: Clinical terminology, HIPAA/HITECH compliance, EHR patterns, health data management
